text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whoa! I knew I was right to believe in you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I don't need a horoscope to tell me you're my
lucky person, Trainer! Thank you so, sooo much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With my lucky plushie in hand, I feel like I can do
anything!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! Not only is it adorable, but I get the
feeling it has a mystical aura to it too!
